text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm walking through the halls on the way back to
my office, when...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Uniqueness, uniqueness... Hmm. I've thought
about it so much I'm starting to get all confused.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: You're still on this uniqueness thing? I can't believe you.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Well, yeah... No one's gonna remember a normal
Umamusume like me.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Don't be like that... But if it's uniqueness you
want, why not talk to her?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
And just like that, it came to me. Who needs
stairs in this day and age when you could have
slides?!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Right! Time to do us some DIY!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Ooh! Now that is unique! I can really learn something here!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Wait, what—No! I was joking! Unique doesn't
even cover it with her—she's nuts!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Look closer! She's getting chased by Air Groove!
And Air Groove looks reeeally mad!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Wow... Her uniqueness really must be off the
charts!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Oh boy. She's completely off in her own world. Sigh... Guess I'll just have to lean into it...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Okay, listen. There's no way you can measure up
to Golshi's prank level. She's a regular prankster
queen.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
If you're gonna take inspiration from her, I'd
suggest starting with some regular pranks.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: I can't do pranks, Nature. Pranks are bad.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I appreciate the sensible answer. But you're trying
to be like Golshi, right?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Y-you're right... But I don't want to cause
trouble for anyone or damage anything...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Well, in that case, why don't you get some help from that person who's been listening in on us? ...That's okay with you, right?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Oh, will you really help?! Thank you so, so much!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Swept up by her enthusiasm, I find myself going
along with Matikanetannhauser's pranks...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe. I am the prankster Matikanetannhauser.
Now, let the pranking commence!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Uh, would you mind closing your eyes? I'm
planning to doodle on your face...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Aaand she's explaining the prank before she does
it.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: I'll just do this here and that there and... Done!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Pfft... Drawing eyes on someone's eyelids... a
classic... Pfft, ahahaha!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Whew! It turned out great!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Phew... What a riot. Hold on though... Why did
you go all in like that? I mean, look at all the
lashes you drew.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I used a water-based marker, so it'll come off
easily. But just to be safe, be sure to wash it off
soon, okay?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for helping me out! I think I might just turn
into a prank master at this rate!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Yep, for sure.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Hm... wait. Does a single prank really make me
any more unique?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
It doesn't, right? I just asked someone if I could
doodle on their face, then did it. That's nothing!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh! I should have realized before I did my
prank! This didn't help at all! I'm still so normal!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Normal by your standards, maybe. But is that
such a bad thing?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Huh?! You mean no matter what I do, I'll always just be boring, normal old me?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
But I've been trying sooo hard... Can't I catch a
break, just once?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha... I think you're plenty interesting juuust
the way you are.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanetannhauser might be a little off-kilter,
but she's always straightforward when it comes to
pursuing her goals.
